questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate option to improve the underlined segment in the given sentence. If there is no need to improve it, select ‘no improvement required’. The first step in making a kite is to fasten two sticks of bamboo together in the form of a cross.

options.text: in making a kite is to fastened
in making a kite is to fastening
into making a kite is fasten

questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate direct form of the given sentence. The driver asked a passerby if he could tell him the way to the market.

options.text: The driver said to a passerby, “Tell me the way to the market, will you”
The driver said to a passerby, “Please, will you tell me the way to the market?”
The driver said to a passerby, “Can you tell me the way to the market?”
The driver said to a passerby, “Could he tell him the way to the market?”

questions.correct_option_text: The driver said to a passerby, “Can you tell me the way to the market?”

questions.question_text_full: Select the word which means the same as the group of words given. one who talks to oneself
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in direct speech. Your sister will say that she has lost her pen again.

options.text: Your sister said, “She has lost my pen again.”
Your sister will say, “I have lost my pen again.”
Your sister will say, “I lost my pen again.”
Your sister says, “I lost her pen again.”

questions.correct_option_text: Your sister will say, “I have lost my pen again.”
